calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jan-17-2006 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Feb-09-2006 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Court Trial/Prove-Up.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Yvonne Lee.
Gregory P. Brock, Esq. and Dennis Kelly, Esq., for Plaintiff: Bode Gravel.
Plaintiff's Witness: Dan Bordan and William Garland, were sworn and direct examined.
No appearance by the Defendant: Ramirez Developers dba Pacific Cement.
Exh. 1-25 Invoice and Yard Tickets-----------ID/EVID.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff as follows:
Principal $11,057.01
Costs $358.50,a Total of $11,415.51
Counsel stipulated for the return of Exhibit in open court and to prepare Judgment.

Feb. 9, 2006
Judgment signed by Comm. Kaplan.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-28-2005 Set For Trial On Jan-17-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-09-2005 Off Calendar
